evidence: Pod is assigned to node node1
Timeline contains NodeNotReady or equivalent kubelet readiness signal

causes.message: Node is NotReady due to kubelet or node-level health failure
Workload cannot run or schedule normally while the node is NotReady

pod:api-pod: Pod is affected by a NotReady node condition

likely_causes: Kubelet is stopped or unhealthy on the node
Node heartbeat is failing or delayed
Node network partition is preventing control-plane communication
Underlying VM or host health is degraded
suggested_checks: Check kubelet status and node heartbeats
